signals.headline: ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M in Best Week Since January, Driving Price Above $2,288 | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M in Best Week Since January, Driving Price Above $2,288 | YES | HIGH**  
Ethereum ETFs recorded over $275 million in weekly inflows—the strongest since January 2026—with Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA leading, as ETH price climbed 7% to nearly $2,400 amid a broader market rally.[1]
